aboutHero.title: An academic AI society for curious builders, researchers, and future leaders.
aboutHero.copy: SSAI was founded to give students a professional environment for exploring artificial intelligence beyond the classroom through research, technical projects, events, and interdisciplinary collaboration.

aboutCards.title: Vision
aboutCards.copy: To become a recognized university hub where students shape trustworthy, useful, and creative AI systems.

aboutCards.title: Mission
aboutCards.copy: To empower students through AI education, research mentorship, applied projects, and professional exposure.

aboutCards.title: Objectives
aboutCards.copy: Host technical programs, support research groups, connect students with mentors, and showcase student innovation.

aboutCards.title: What SSAI Does
aboutCards.copy: SSAI runs workshops, hackathons, speaker sessions, project sprints, research meetups, and interdisciplinary collaborations.

aboutFocus.title: From core AI foundations to emerging applied research.

items.title: Founding Chapter
items.copy: Student founders organize the first AI learning circles and project teams.

items.title: Research Tracks
items.copy: Healthcare AI, RAG systems, robotics, and vision groups launch with faculty guidance.

items.title: Industry Portal
items.copy: SSAI expands public programming, partnerships, and project showcases for external collaborators.

eventsHero.title: Workshops, hackathons, conferences, meetups, and speaker sessions.
eventsHero.copy: Filter upcoming SSAI programming by format and find the next event that matches your goals.

pastEventsHero.title: Conference recaps and signature SSAI programs.
pastEventsHero.copy: Explore previous SSAI events, speakers, highlights, student showcases, and networking activities.

projectsHero.title: AI project showcases across health, language, agents, robotics, and discovery.
projectsHero.copy: Search by title, domain, technology, or contributor, then open a project for deeper details.

leadershipHero.title: Faculty mentors, current officers, and SSAI leadership alumni.
leadershipHero.copy: The SSAI leadership team coordinates programs, guides research teams, builds technical infrastructure, and keeps the community connected.
